'''âl-f-p-l''' ('''kalafpeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallcrawl|wallcrawl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallcrawl|wallcrawl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-f-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| kalafpeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilafpeloko|thilafpeloko]] || [[word:jilafpeloko|jilafpeloko]] || [[word:shilafpeloko|shilafpeloko]] || [[word:kilafpeloko|kilafpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulafpeloko|thuthulafpeloko]] || [[word:jujulafpeloko|jujulafpeloko]] || [[word:shushulafpeloko|shushulafpeloko]] || [[word:kukulafpeloko|kukulafpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulafpeloko|thulafpeloko]] || [[word:julafpeloko|julafpeloko]] || [[word:shulafpeloko|shulafpeloko]] || [[word:kulafpeloko|kulafpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulafpeloko|thulafpeloko]] || [[word:julafpeloko|julafpeloko]] || [[word:shulafpeloko|shulafpeloko]] || [[word:kulafpeloko|kulafpeloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholafpeloko|tholafpeloko]] || [[word:jolafpeloko|jolafpeloko]] || [[word:sholafpeloko|sholafpeloko]] || [[word:kolafpeloko|kolafpeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholafpeloko|tholafpeloko]] || [[word:jolafpeloko|jolafpeloko]] || [[word:sholafpeloko|sholafpeloko]] || [[word:kolafpeloko|kolafpeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlafpeloko|thĂŠlafpeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠlafpeloko|jĂŠlafpeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠlafpeloko|shĂŠlafpeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠlafpeloko|kĂŠlafpeloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalafpeloko|thalafpeloko]] || [[word:jalafpeloko|jalafpeloko]] || [[word:shalafpeloko|shalafpeloko]] || [[word:kalafpeloko|kalafpeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
